title: Strut Your Stuff
description: Minecraft mod library for "strut" blocks, that span between two positions. Provides polished rendering, collision and interaction systems.
body:
# Strut Your Stuff!

Library used for creating blocks that span from one block to another in a continuous, interactable structure.

## Key features:
* **Collision structures:** Struts create physical collision structures, ensuring more polished interaction.
* **Flywheel integration:** Struts can be rendered within Flywheel's rendering system, allowing for improved performance.
* **Surface clipping:** Strut models are clipped to surfaces for a more polished look.
* **Cable Styles:** Struts can be provided with cable behaviours to disable collisions, keep shapes and get natural droop effects.

## For users

This mod is a library, so install it for the required mod, and have fun!

## For developers

This mod's documentation is available at [struts.azmod.net](https://struts.azmod.net/)
